abilities.description: Seek a creature card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value and put that card onto the battlefield. That creature is a Phyrexian in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: Seek a creature card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value and put that card onto the battlefield. That creature is a Phyrexian in addition to its other types. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: Seek
